info.name: Currency Belize
info.description: Belize Dollar (BZD) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency). BZD is pegged 2:1 with USD.

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy BZD with USD. Example: 2.00 means 1 USD = 2.00 BZD (pegged rate)

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell BZD for USD. Example: 2.00 means 1 USD = 2.00 BZD (pegged rate)
